column1: # river.pdf page 20 ("Bend instability revisited") -- digitized pins of the six

# PROVENANCE.  Values below are the 300-dpi digitization made 2026-07-12 for the
# render).  They were INDEPENDENTLY corroborated 2026-07-21 by reading river.pdf p.20
# directly at the resolution available here: peaks read 0.245/0.44/0.295 (D family) and
# and peak positions 0.20/0.31/0.43 and 0.25/0.31/0.36 against 0.21/0.29/0.43 and
# 0.24/0.31/0.37 -- agreement within the stated reading error in every case.
# PANEL MAPPING (the deck's own layout is crossed):
#   growth-rate LEFT  / phase-speed RIGHT = D family     at gamma = 0.05
#   growth-rate RIGHT / phase-speed LEFT  = gamma family at D = 0.6
# c0 = phase speed at the k* -> 0 axis edge.  kzero = growth-rate zero crossing.
# No value in this file is computed by any model; all are read off the figure.
